text:
miwi        2007-05-01 11:16:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/lhs2TeX        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/lhs2TeX/files  patch-Makefile patch-configure 
  Log:
  lhs2TeX is a preprocessor to generate LaTeX code from literate Haskell
  sources. It is released under the GPL.
  
  WWW: http://www.informatik.uni-bonn.de/~loeh/lhs2tex/
  
  PR:             ports/112096
  Submitted by:   mainland at apeiron.net
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2751    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/devel/lhs2TeX/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/lhs2TeX/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/devel/lhs2TeX/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/devel/lhs2TeX/files/patch-configure (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/lhs2TeX/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/devel/lhs2TeX/pkg-plist (new)
